response.justification: Bogdan has strong, demonstrable full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms, with direct alignment to the required stack and AI-agent work. His 6+ years of senior roles, open-source contributions, and deep testing/DevOps practices exceed requirements, though his German language skill is basic and Nest.js/Vitest are not explicitly mentioned (though implied via Node/TypeScript/testing).
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud infrastructure (AWS, Docker, Kubernetes)
Proven AI-agent and developer tooling contributions at Naver, directly matching a key requirement
Strong testing culture, open-source leadership, and DevOps expertise (CI/CD, GitLab, Vitest-like tooling)
concerns: Nest.js and Vitest not explicitly listed in skills, though Node.js/TypeScript/testing experience is robust
German language proficiency is only basic, which may limit collaboration in Berlin-based teams
Some roles lack clear metrics or product impact details (e.g., Tencent pricing optimizations)
